markdownRemark.html:
The 3 ways of generating passive income

  1. Freelance-Product Model
  2. Audience-Advertising Model
  3. Expert-Product Model

3 Projects You Can Create

  • FP Model

    • You can create some product (software or website or platform) that solves a specific problem (basd off of stuff you see in freelance work)
    • Inspiration: Brian Casel

  • Mix of AA and EP Model

    • Become an "expert" in a specific topic and have website and everything that you can put ads on and monetize and do affiliate marketing
    • Sell a bunch of digital products
    • eBooks
    • online courses
    • Audio and music
    • Videos

  • Muse Plan

    • Variation of FP model where you make a physical product to solve a need
    • Delegate responsibility so you own the business but don't run it
